name: oxidation-part-1
content:
Oxidation
Chromium-rich oxide scales can slow oxygen ingress at high temperature.

name: creep-part-1
content:
Creep
Creep rate increases when temperature and applied stress increase together.

name: microstructure-part-1
content:
Microstructure
Fine precipitates impede dislocation motion and improve high-temperature strength.
